title: Decorative Dog Balloon - Nordic Gold Modern Balloon Dog Resin Figure Decoration for Living Room, Bedroom, Office and
features: Luxurious design: the dog statue is a masterpiece that combines creativity and playfulness, adding a unique and enjoyable touch to any room. It is a gift that will put a smile on your face.

Versatile presentation possibilities: the sculpture has its individual statement for each viewer. Placed on a shelf, a side table in the living room and bedroom area or even on a desk in the office, this statue will definitely be a good eye-catcher.
Handmade: The modern sculpture is made of high-quality resin and carefully painted by hand. With handmade sculptures you reveal your extraordinary art taste.

A special gift: our sculpture is a great gift for any kind of occasion such as housewarming gift, housewarming gift, moving gift, Mother's Day, Women's Day, birthday, Christmas, wedding. Your loved ones will certainly be happy to have this statue to stand in their home.

Satisfaction guarantee: the quality of our products is very important to us. That's why every item is checked before it leaves our warehouse. However, if you are not satisfied with the product, we are always at your disposal.
description: The handmade balloon dog figurine is an enchanting way to decorate any room. With realistic detail and a bright, whimsical design, this statue brings a fun and vibrant atmosphere to any room. The statue is perfect for bedroom or living room and will bring a smile to any face. It is made of resin and will last for many years. If you are a lover of modern art and luxurious furnishings, this carefully crafted sculpture will make a perfect addition to your interior. Package includes: 1 x sculpture "balloon dog" in gold.
